title: World Cup 2026 epidemic risk assessment with Ebola Bundibugyo activity as one input
key_message: Preprint risk assessment includes Ebola risk anchored to reported Bundibugyo ebolavirus activity during the 2026 DRC/Uganda outbreak.
details: Relevant to international dissemination and mass-gathering importation risk; not limited to DRC/Uganda, so interpret as a spillover-risk analysis rather than direct outbreak transmission modelling.

title: A Hybrid One Health–Community Adaptive Suppression Model for the 2026 Bundibugyo Ebolavirus Outbreak in Conflict Settings
key_message: Preprint proposes a modelling framework for suppression of the 2026 Bundibugyo outbreak under conflict and community-response constraints.
details: Useful as a candidate modelling paper for intervention scenarios; requires review of assumptions, data inputs, calibration, and whether it uses confirmed or suspected case counts.
relevance: Directly about the 2026 DRC/Uganda outbreak; model-based intervention analysis.

title: Risk of cross-border spillover from the 2026 Bundibugyo ebolavirus outbreak
key_message: Preprint evaluates cross-border spillover risk from the 2026 Bundibugyo outbreak in eastern DRC.
details: Relevant for Uganda, South Sudan, Rwanda and broader regional preparedness; requires review of mobility assumptions, spatial scale, and validation.
relevance: Directly about cross-border risk from the 2026 outbreak.
